task_completion.description: Agent connected to the demodb database in OrientDB Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio interface is visible in the browser with 'demodb' shown as the active database in the top navigation or connection screen.

task_completion.description: The HotelCountryMetrics vertex class is created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schema tab lists 'HotelCountryMetrics' (extending V), or a successful 'CREATE CLASS HotelCountryMetrics EXTENDS V' command is executed in the Browse tab.

task_completion.description: A unique index is created on the Country property
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Indexes tab shows a UNIQUE index for the Country property of HotelCountryMetrics, or a successful 'CREATE INDEX' command (e.g., ON HotelCountryMetrics (Country) UNIQUE) is visible.

task_completion.description: The class is populated with the correct aggregated hotel and luxury counts per country
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query result in the Browse tab shows records for HotelCountryMetrics containing the correct counts (e.g., Italy: 3 total, 2 luxury; Germany: 2 total, 1 luxury; France: 2 total, 1 luxury).

task_completion.description: The report batch tag is included in the populated records
task_completion.visual_evidence: The query results for HotelCountryMetrics show a property (e.g., ReportBatch) with the value 'bi_q1_2026' for the records.

integrity.description: Agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the OrientDB Studio web interface in a browser (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html), not just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Results are generated by executing queries or using the GUI in OrientDB Studio
integrity.visual_evidence: The query results appear in the standard OrientDB Studio result table or JSON view, not mocked in a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy-paste a hardcoded JSON or text file to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show actual SQL commands (like CREATE CLASS, INSERT, SELECT) being executed in the OrientDB Studio Browse tab.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target database: demodb. Class: HotelCountryMetrics (must be a Vertex class). Must have a UNIQUE index on the Country property. Report batch tag: 'bi_q1_2026'. Expected data for 11 countries: Italy (3 total, 2 luxury), Germany (2 total, 1 luxury), France (2 total, 1 luxury), and 8 others (United Kingdom, United States, Japan, Australia, Brazil, Spain, Greece, Netherlands) with 1 total, 1 luxury each. Luxury is defined as 5 stars.
